title: Update fields safely
description: A project owner or AI tool updates fields on an existing document; valid updates persist and invalid updates are refused without disturbing disk state.
iWant: to update fields on an existing document
soThat: I can revise content without rewriting the whole document or risking an invalid result

acceptanceCriteria.description: A valid update is persisted with updatedAt advanced and validates
acceptanceCriteria.then: the document is rewritten with the change and its updatedAt timestamp advanced, and it validates

acceptanceCriteria.description: An update that would invalidate the document leaves disk unchanged and returns the validation error
acceptanceCriteria.given: an update that would make the document invalid
acceptanceCriteria.then: the document on disk is unchanged and the validation error is returned

acceptanceCriteria.description: Updating a non-existent document returns a not-found error and writes nothing
acceptanceCriteria.given: an update to a document that does not exist
acceptanceCriteria.then: a not-found error is returned and nothing is written
